summary: SEO System Backend Testing - All 31 tests passed. Comprehensive testing of preview-html SEO injection, fallback hierarchy, redirect CRUD, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, portal path exclusions, and static file serving.
critical_code_review_comments: seo_middleware.py: inject_seo_into_html() correctly handles all SEO tags (title, meta, OG, Twitter, canonical, JSON-LD, tracking scripts)
seo_middleware.py: should_inject_seo() properly excludes /api/*, /admin, /reseller, /partner, /login, and static files
server.py catch-all route: Correctly checks redirects first, serves static files, then injects SEO only for public pages
routes/seo.py: get_seo_render_data() implements proper fallback hierarchy (Page-Level -> Global -> Auto-generated)
seed_data_creation: Test redirect /TEST_old-page created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO system fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/seo/preview-html?path=X returns HTML with SEO injection, GET /api/seo/global returns global SEO config, GET /api/seo/render?path=X returns JSON SEO data with fallback hierarchy. Redirect at /old-about -> /about works via localhost:8001 catch-all. Portal paths (/admin, /login, /reseller, /partner) correctly excluded from SEO injection.

preview_html_injection.GET /api/seo/preview-html?path=/: PASS - Returns HTML with title, meta description, OG tags, Twitter cards, canonical URL, JSON-LD, GA4 script, google-site-verification
preview_html_injection.GET /api/seo/preview-html?path=/about: PASS - Page-level overrides (custom title 'About Our Master Tailors'), fallback to global for OG image
preview_html_injection.GET /api/seo/preview-html?path=/contact-: PASS - Title and canonical URL correct

html_integrity.div#root untouched: PASS - Present in all injected HTML
html_integrity.React bundle preserved: PASS - Script and CSS links intact
